pkgmetadata.longdescription: forgejo-cli (binary name: fj) is a command-line client for Forgejo, the soft-fork of Gitea that powers Codeberg and other community git forges. It supports issues, pull requests (including AGit-style), releases, repositories, organizations, teams, and authentication, alongside ordinary git so it complements rather than replaces it.
forgejo-cli（命令名 fj）是 Forgejo 的命令行客户端。Forgejo 是 Gitea 的软分叉，驱动了 Codeberg 等社区 git 平台。该工具支持 issue、PR （含 AGit 风格）、release、仓库、组织、团队管理与认证等操作， 与 git 协同工作而非替代之。
